chapter_title.ar: بَابُ أَنَّهُ لَا يَكُونُ الِاعْتِكَافُ إِلَّا بِصَوْمٍ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 77 – The Itikaaf (seclusion in the Masjid) does not take place except with Fasting

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/427)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/427)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) لَا اعْتِكَافَ إِلَّا بِصَوْمٍ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Al Husayn, from Safwan Bin Yahya, from Al A’ala Bin Razeyn, from Muhammad Bin Muslim who said,
‘Abu Abdullahasws said: ‘There is no Itikaaf except with Fasting’.
en.sarwar: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Muhammad ibn al-Husayn, from Safwan ibn Yahya from al-‘Ala’ ibn Razin from Muhammad ibn Muslim who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Without fast ’I‘tikaf is not valid.’”
